title: The Heart of a Queen
writer: Harald Braun, Jacob Geis, Franz-Jürgen Kleinert
actors: Zarah Leander, Willy Birgel, Maria Koppenhöfer
plot: While awaiting her unjust execution at the hands of the treacherous Queen Elizabeth I, the tragic Mary Stuart reflects at the series of cruel political machinations that set up her path to the scaffold.
